blocks.content: **Course Abstract:** Welcome to the foundational session of Google Antigravity (AGY), the next-generation AI developer tool announced at Google I/O. Before we can orchestrate AI agents to write code or execute terminal commands, we must establish a secure, working environment.

Based on our enterprise pilot sessions, **AGY-101 v0.2** focuses *exclusively* on getting Antigravity successfully installed and initialized within a restricted corporate IT environment. We will bypass Docker and external repository blocks by utilizing a secure Tarball method on a provisioned Cloudtop VM. As we like to say: *"No install, no magic."*
